prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Bulk relabel issues using a sentence (InfraChatPanel surface)

![Bulk relabel issues using a sentence (InfraChatPanel surface)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/48424589f4ba24aeaf761cb989291af0403bc24c/openspec/changes/gh-142-bulk-relabel/evidence/final.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Launch the Orbion app in mock mode
2. Verify the sidebar shows the mock VM
3. Verify the InfraChatPanel is visible with the composer
4. Type 'mark these as to-refine' in the composer
5. Screenshot captures the InfraChatPanel surface

</details>
